column1: Hurricane Debby has made landfall around 7am,  5 miles west of Steinhatchee, FL  with 80 mph max winds moving NNE at 10mph.
Praying for everyone affected by the storm,prayers for the emergency workers and their families 🙏❤️🙏
This sure has not been a fun storm

lol people say oh this is typical Florida weather. Nothing typical about your house roaring 4 plus hours and its just a tropical storm”It started around 2 am in Nokomis and just kept going . This video is 7 am ish and I thought we were done

I wish that the “predictors” would stop trying to guess the forecast and stop saying” nothing to worry about. “. “Mostly a rain event for us” and so on. There is only one solid prediction. EVERY storm is something to be concerned about.

I was up 1/2 the night worrying about tornadoes 🌪️
We made the kids sleep in our room 💔
I hear ya!!
Said nobody ever!
I thought you said it was a fun storm. 🥴
“fun”? 🤡
This storm is a great reminder that they are more than just lines on a map. Remember folks begging to not be hit by the little 'ol TS. Probably would have been better for all.
Thank you for keeping us updated. I don’t even bother watching any news anymore. All I do is follow your lead. Bless you 🙏
same here!
me too
same
I have been praying for all in the path of this storm. We've had wind gusts and heavy rain, but nothing like others are experiencing. Thank you for your updates.

Any specifics on flooded roads in St. Pete to Seminole or is there a current list of flooded roads that would be impassable? Pinellas county schools are open today for teachers so wondering how much flooding I may have to travel today.
I heard shore acres is pretty flooded. I had an appointment this morning with someone who lives there and she had to cancel. Not sure the specifics
they won’t be able to park at Shore Acres Elementary because residents park there when a storm is coming. That lot is full right now and the neighborhood is flooded so they aren’t going anywhere.
I saw this on someone's FB Page.
Any updates from anyone in Chiefland, my sister lives there and I haven’t heard from her. Praying for everyone’s safety!!
praying you hear from her!
thank you.
I work in Chiefland. Lots without power. Roads are blocked but other than that I haven’t heard much! 💙
thank you for the update. I hope to hear from her soon, they aren’t far from the Suwannee river, so water and wind worry me. Hope you and yours and well.
I live just north of Bell but work at a salon in Chiefland. If I hear any further info I will be sure to pass it along. Praying you hear from your sister soon 🤍
Join the FB group What’s Happening in Chiefland Fl. People are asking about specific areas in Chiefland and are getting information from people that live in/near that area.
Sarasota and Manatee Counties got annihilated and it’s still coming down! This is brutal! Almost every main road is underwater!
I’m in manatee county and it just keeps coming. It slows down for a few minutes and then wham!!
we sure did! I’m in Sarasota and it’s been pouring nonstop since yesterday morning and it’s STILL pouring!
same here in Pinellas County. Raining hard. Windy. Lost power. Back on. Now no Spectrum service so no internet or tv. Using data to get updates on phone.
omg
yes and loud night way worse than last one 🌀
way worse than Ian rain wise for sure! Lots of water rescues going on right now, many vehicles floating down roadways.
I’m in Osprey at a friends house, I’m supposed to be leaving to drive to st pete for work… looks like I won’t make it 😭😩

I would highly suggest to call off and stay off the roads. It’s not worth risking your life or vehicle! All of our first responders are inundated at the moment, and 911 calls are taking upwards of 5 minutes to be answered.
I hear ya… I just had every intention of getting stuff done at work today to prep for the rest of week 😥
we’re headed to Bradenton Beach in 2 weeks. 😫
my husband had to come get truck to get to work, cars stalled all over because of water

I have never seen a storm send continuous rain and wind like this for this length of time. We are in Wesley Chapel. I thought we were getting a break this morning but nope! It just keeps coming. This should end our rain deficit I believe. Thanks Denis for your hard work through the storm. I hope you get some sleep soon.⚡️💨☔️🌪️🥱❤️
Agreed, same here in Valrico, have been here 40 years and never remember a storm just going on and on and on! Be safe.
I agree! It’s still going on here in Carrollwood too! 🤦🏻‍♀️

same in south Land O Lakes.
Rain, rain...time to go away
9.5" total in Wesley chapel from my rain gauge 10 am yesterday to 8 am today.
same east of Lake Wales.

east coast experienced this with Francis and Jeanne back in 2004. Both made the same landfall within a few weeks apart. They were slow movers and dumped a ton of rain. 2 storms I won’t forget. I just had a newborn. I was watching this storm and noticing, sadly, it seems like a repeat of that. Hoping it gets moving!!! Stay safe.

me either never saw storms act like this and so widespread. It used to be when it went by it would basically calm down. This one stayed all over to continue massive rain and wind and these tornadoe warning are crazy I don’t remember them being such an issue.
I’ve lived my whole life here 69 yrs
I'm just so glad we didn't lose power!!
That whole area was still a mess from the storm last year when we drove through in December.
Praying for my family up there and everyone else as well 🙏
please lmk your family is safe. 😍
lasi I heard during the eye of the storm they were ok. Shaken and devastated but safe ✝️🙏
up where?
Going on 21 hours straight rain in Dover…..that’s enough Debby!!!

I saw another weather forecast last night which interrupted a show I was watching. All I could say was “you have it all wrong, you should be watching Denis”. They had it turning right early. That’s why I trust only Denis with the accurate, RULE#7 forecast. Thanks Denis for getting us through another bumpy night. You are the best.
Rough night and morning right now in Gainesville area. No lights. Strong gusts
Prayers
here in lakeland as well
same south of you
When will it stop in St. Pete?! 😤
it’s below us now? Bout how far? Looks pretty calm in the ocean.
It sure wasn't a fun Storm,we got some clean up to do,still we were very blessed, no damage to our house and never lost power,the yard is a mess!!!
Thank you and your team ,as used , got us thru it well informed!
Praying everyone stays safe and there is minimal damage.
Praying for all in the path Steinhatchee has a special place in my heart
Glad it wasn't bad for us . Prayers for the ones getting the Cat 1. These storms and hurricanes are always so unpredictable and last minute twists and turns.
Praying for all those impacted by this storm. 🙏
Does anyone know how 275 and I4 is from Riverview to st Pete? Or specifically Howard Franklin Bridge?
the HF is closed Northbound due to water on the bridge. Here is live footage of southbound: https://www.youtube.com/live/f2vRYNmwlLo?si=D6tcfzOjkENE8C0J
Still raining and windy here in new port richey. Praying for everyone
Wondering about my place in River Crossing. I am out of state until Wed. when I fly back into home there.
Thank you, Sweetheart. My daughter used to live in Water's Edge. In PA now where I am on a short trip. That is very kind of you.

Thank you. I will be flying in Wednesday. So glad the storm is over in our part of the country. Sorry for those that experienced flooding or other negative impact from the storm. I pray that those farther on up the way are spared, too. Thank you for caring and sharing with me.
Thank you. Folks like you and my wonderful peeps at First Baptist, Elfers and my Lord Jesus are such Blessings. All of you bring encouragement!
brutal this morning in npr
I know and my husband had to drive to the usps for work in it at 3 something this morning. :(Was horrible
my father was a postal employees for 40 years. “Rain or shine”. Etc.
Going to continue most of the day.
Thank you for keeping us updated Denis Phillips
Ok Denis! I am over this already!!!! Could you turn it off for the rest of the season???? Lol ! Wish you you were on now. I swear we had a tornado. In Lakeland off saddle creek road.
you probably did lots of warnings posted during the night
It is pouring in Clearwater again, Debbie needs to take her tails with her.
Still coming down good in north port !

N. WW. 6am got slammed with rain and intense winds. Just before 7 it wasn’t raining 😮Threw clothes on and rushed Dog #1 out successfully ! *almost * got my old boy walked before skies opened again - partial success, lol. Still pouring here but winds seem to be easing. ☕️Time for me now !!
same here in Forest Hills…. 2 dogs successfully outside before it started pouring again. Brutal! 🐶

It's pouring in Sun City, Ruskin, and Big Bend Road at Balm Riverview...rain is still coming down sideways. Debby is a baddy!!
I've been in my house almost 5yrs and have never seen this much water in the pond connector
I obviously and going to need one of those now. My yards haven't flooded in uears

Thanks so much for the updates. We’re in Orlando, over from England-what can we expect here? Currently pouring down, bit of thunder, lightening-will it get worse? Do we need to think about stocking up on goods??

I doubt you'd find any goods left anywhere anyways. Plus you'll probably encounter flooded roads. Best you stay inside until it's over. I hope you have food or snacks to tie you over. It'll be over soon.
I’m from England came last night . Went to supermarket and it’s wet and windy but will settle been here like this before
thanks. Yeah-we made a run for it coming out of Target! 😂 just when we think we left all the rain at home!
your right ha ha I thought yesterday and today maybe wet but ok tomorrow x
you lucky your flight got to Orlando. Lots of flights delayed then cancelled last night after people waited for hours!
Yes I thought that very sad for people who can’t get here
it’s pretty much over with in that area. Just some lingering rain bands.
Calm, clear, concise, and continuous factual updates... it's the Denis Phillips way.
Still pouring down here in Sarasota
it’s ridiculous. I’ve never seen this much rain in Sarasota. My backyard looks like my swimming pool.
yep!
same here in Plant City
It has been much worse than we thought here in St Pete. Still raining very hard and windy.
We're getting hammered in Sarasota County

Sarasota is a mess with flooding central part of Sarasota main arteries are an issue. Lake Sarasota, Sarasota Springs with major water. Your news people are on Lido, much deeper water elsewhere. It sounds like Philippi Creek is involved from resident reports.
Still pouring and flooded on our street in Largo!
girrrrlll we are underwater.
ugh!!!!! Your car okay?
yeah! Luckily our driveways and parking up on an uphill slant!
I need the rain to stop my dog is over it! Keeping me up all night. Still raining near ppark
mine too!!!
I with you.... dog has legs crossed!

Vero Beach native here.. many hurricanes dealing with dogs not going out to pee so .. I've started using a kiddie pool w a couple pieces of sod in it. It's perfect & after the storm just wash out the pool! Dogs had no problem w it 👍
my dog too!
We adopted our girl last August. She slept with me last night for the first time! She is terrified of storms.
palm harbor too
Reminds me of tropical storm Debby 2012 it sat over us for a couple of days and the rain continuously nonstop
Thank you Denis Phillips for staying up with us and getting us through another one RULE #7
I am currently in Clearwater and it’s bad 😢 we are safe in our hotels but the winds and the rain are very crazy
NE Florida winds picking up. Hubby was sent home he said the rain is dumping out there. Pray Debbie decipitates before she gets here! Praying for all in the middle of it now 🙏
How many inches of rain has Wesley Chapel received so far? I'm draining my pool here and it's overflowing.

hey Dan! Not sure if there’s some kind of map that shows this. It seems it’s been raining since noon yesterday non stop (although I know there are pauses between the rain bands). We found a roof leak last night 😭
last I saw was up to 5” in most of the WC area.
Update on Crystal River please.
it’s high tide right now and the waters are rising. Some areas are starting to flood now.
How is Gainesville? I have two kids in college over there. I know they have no power.
the rain is very very heavy right now with about 25-30 mph winds steady
I’m five mins from campus, I have power. The rain has not let up really. I’m not hearing of any flooding or power outages near campus
Denis when are you going Live again?
Did the track shift at all?
yes

Denis Phillips here’s something you don’t see everyday… a catfish in our condo parking lot in Oldsmar 😂😂 It was struggling to get back to deeper water so my husband gently scooted her along to the nearby drainage ditch.
walking catfish! My old apartment that didn’t even have a pond had them “walking” on their fins on the sidewalks after a heavy rain.
They do!
"Walking" catfish, probably. I've had them before down the curb across the street in front of my house from the preserve a ways over across the street. They travel on those fins!
wow.
where in Oldsmar was this?
Eastlake Woodlands a little after 7 am
oh wow. I live in here also.
I thought people were joking in the comments - until I came into work this AM and my coworkers were showing us videos of them pushing catfish back into the storm drains lol
Yep, been there, done that!
Why does this band keep drenching us over Sarasota? Doesn’t seem to be moving at all.
its a hurricane......
because there’s a TS in the gulf. Brilliant.
Isn't that where debby of 2012 hit?
Anyone know how Gandy is from Tampa heading to st Pete?? Daughter has to drive it this am and I am worried.
I came across from st Pete to Tampa at about 7 and it was fine. Just lots of traffic
Prayers everyone is safe 🙏
It’s almost 8am why is there no coverage on the storm ?! 😭
Well,all this people that wanted rain,I hope you're happy
I have never heard of that place.
Thank you for all you do to keep us informed. Take care and get some rest!

Lakleland here I have SO MUCH WATER in my yards all under water now, thank goodness for old sandbags surrounding the ac unit. It's still freaking raining I live now in a house boat So thankful not to be in its path but these rain bands!!!
Do not underestimate a Cat 1 storm. I have lived in High Springs just west of the landfall for last 20 years, and this is the worst storm damage we have experienced in that time period.
A lot of wind here in Hudson right now.
yes

We are not in a flood zone and we are on high enough land never flooded before and we had water all the way up to our doors it was very scary not looking forward to any other storms thank you for the great information
my friend’s family lives in Venice and I am worried. Any idea how that area is affected?
that is far south for me I am not sure about Venice
I think all of Florida is a flood zone.
after this storm I believe it
Pouring and windy in Pinellas Park. It's also thundering.
Prayers 🙏🙏🙏🙏 for all in the path of this storm. Still raining here in Polk County. Please be safe.
We are flooded in Parrish. The photo is the fence line in our front yard. The water is going over the road. We’ve got about a 6ft area of grass around the house to potty dogs. This is crazy!
Just lost electric in Citrus Park Tampa

So much rain in Nokomis! It was blowing so hard sideways I developed new leaks where there was never a problem before. Dogs were scared first thing this morning with lightening and thunder. I’m so over this.
Aaaaand it’s pouring again!
Thank you for the great job you did keeping us informed. Prayers everyone is safe 🙏
New Port Richey
Praying for all the Steinhatchee Locals 🙏🏻
What a storm!!!
those poor people the stress of waiting for it to hit then being in the middle of it all.. it's just too much to bear...
I hope everyone is ok 🙏🏼
Never saw so much strange widespread coverage in all my life 69 years in Florida
Tell her she can get the heck out of Pinellas Park now, this has been worse than Idalia…12 hrs without power and counting…
Prayers for Crystal River area... Thanks for keeping us informed!
Yup... it's windy here. We are close to the eye.
I don't remember a storm parking like this..
Sending Prayers to everyone in the path of this storm, So Sad🙏❤🙏
For anyone wanting some normal morning news/show, NBC is broadcasting world news.
No power just north of Chiefland, but we’re ok! Rain pounding on the roof all night!
No surge flooding in Crystal River so far .🙏🏽
what’s the weather like there now? I’m supposed to be heading there for work shortly.
HEAVY rain!
raining and windy
high tide is coming
zip code 34428 hight tide is at 3:47pm
seems like it’s all north- Cedar Key, Horseshoe Beach north 🙁
yes
What time should Clearwater beach see the storm surge?
I know your concern...my son is at the same job site as Wes!
Praying for everyone’s saftey
I am scared .I live a few miles from there.
This probably puts Jacksonville in a bad location for the stall and rain totals.
Stay safe everyone
Stay safe... 🙏
These last bands come with a lot of rain and wind.
Any idea of what to expect in Valdosta?
you’re on the west side of the eye so thinking it won’t be as long for you. The east side of this storm is a monster and super long time with heavy rain
thanks. I’m hoping for the best for those getting the worst of it.
good luck! For us in Tampa area, if you look at it we are still getting constant rain

we are too right now and the winds are also picking up. It’s been raining steadily since about 6pm yesterday (with a short break). We don’t have the surge concerns you guys have and I’m sure it’s worse there. Best of luck to you too!
my guess? Definitely wind and rain. Prolly won’t be sunny. Hope this helps.
